economic_notes: GBEs include Ulkatcho Merchantile Ltd., 690361 B.C. Ltd., Yun Ka Wun'ten Development Limited Partnership, Yun Ka Wun'ten Holdings Ltd. Yun Ka Whut'en Development LP had revenue of $6,848,166 and net income of $444,609. Ulkatcho Merchantile Ltd. had revenue of $1,098,670 and net income of $29,319. Management Action Plan initiated by ISC due to financial position in fiscal year ended March 31, 2013. COVID-19 pandemic noted as subsequent event.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2020 but audit was not completed until July 12, 2022 — a significant delay of over two years. Social Housing segment shows $0 expenses in 2020 vs $345,020 in 2019 due to CMHC social housing being removed (disposed in 2019). Restricted cash was $0 in 2020 (was $24,659 in 2019 from CMHC). Four GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. Blackwater project revenue of $827,271 appears non-recurring. Management Action Plan was in place. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $4,124,127 + FNHA $1,521,348 + Province of BC $1,222,532 + FNESC $102,527 + CCATEC $98,210 = $7,068,744; deferred revenue allocations net to zero so excluded. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided.
